---
id: link-dataset-version
title: "Link external URL as dataset version"
description: "Creates a new linked DatasetVersion for an existing LINKED dataset by supplying a public HTTP/HTTPS URL."
sidebar_label: "Link external URL as dataset version"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: platform-api//seqera-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Link external URL as dataset version"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/datasets/{datasetId}/link"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new linked DatasetVersion for an existing LINKED dataset by supplying a public HTTP/HTTPS URL.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
